title: Replace Remote Control fit for BOSE CineMate 535 525 SOLO5 SOLO10 SOLO15 CM520
overview: New: A brand-new, unused, unopened, undamaged item in its original packaging (where packaging is applicable). Packaging should be the same as what is found in a retail store, unless the item is handmade or was packaged by the manufacturer in non-retail packaging, such as an unprinted box or plastic bag.
